title: Expecting empty properties to be returned as null values when creating a MODEL CAR
gherkin:
When the user creates a "MODEL CAR" "F40 Matchbox" with the following data
  | key | value | datatype |
  | name | BMW 2002 | string |
Then the response should contain the following properties
  | key | value | datatype |
  | name | BMW 2002 | string |
  | product_code |  | string |
  | release_year |  | number |
  | scale |  | string |
  | series |  | string |
